title: Clearance Manifest Tier-0 envelope v0.1
description: The byte-exact, keyless Tier-0 integrity envelope emitted by the clearance_record tool. The manifest payload is carried as its exact UTF-8 JSON string (NOT a nested object), and the integrity hash is SHA-256 over that string's exact bytes. Consumers MUST hash the payload string verbatim, compare, and only THEN JSON.parse it to read; they MUST NOT re-serialize or re-canonicalize. The parsed payload conforms to clearance-manifest.schema.json. Tier 1/2 (C2PA signing) are a separate envelope and out of scope for this schema.

tier.description: Tier 0 = keyless integrity (no authenticity). Tiers 1/2 use a C2PA envelope, not this one.

payloadType.description: Media type of the bytes in `payload`.

payload.description: The exact UTF-8 JSON serialization of the manifest payload. Hash this verbatim; parse it to read. The parsed object conforms to clearance-manifest.schema.json.

integrity.description: Integrity over the exact bytes of `payload`. No canonicalization is applied or permitted.

hash.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the UTF-8 bytes of the `payload` string.
